reviews.title: Good location and pleasant hotel and staff
reviews.text: As a single person felt very safe and secure here.  Breakfast was wonderful. Recommend this location highly.

reviews.title: Disappointing and expensive.
reviews.positives: The hotel was clean.
reviews.negatives: The rooms have no closet only 2 hooks on a walk.  The rooms are small with only a desk chair located against the AC/heater - very uncomfortable!  I experienced a cold omlette at 6:10 am and cold water showers on 2 mornings.  When my room was not cleaned due to a mis-Communication, I spent 24 hours requesting housekeeping . I made the request for times during those 24 hours.  I believe the problem was the front desk and not housekeeping. Ultimately, I was reimbursed For one night stay by the general manager. Nonetheless, I suggest that Hilton review this facility for continuation of its franchise. I have stayed at many Hampton Inns for both business and pleasure and have never Experienced such poor accommodations.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: I really enjoyed my stay there.

reviews.title: Very noisy
reviews.positives: Extremely noisy slept a total of 6 hours in 2 days I asked to move to a different room they could not accommodate me
reviews.negatives: No manager on duty on the weekend

reviews.title: Stressful
reviews.positives: Nothing.
reviews.negatives: Hotel wouldn’t let me in for an hour and I had a 4 and a half hour drive. They wouldn’t let me in because the booking.com confirmation number was incorrect, which is absurd. They made me call booking.com to get the “correct” information when I already had booked a room and had proof of it, just stupid and unhelpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable and Consistent
reviews.text: Overall, nice stay for a night and convenient location.  Clean and easy check in.   Gym has the basics and clean.  No bottled water in room, which I think should include at least one or two bottles.   Breakfast is really mediocre....Price to value is a bit high.

reviews.title: Very nice
reviews.text: newly renovated, clean, nice,  complimentary breakfast buffet was nice and fresh, staff was friendly and helpful. Location is close to all  shopping and food.  Would stay here again.

reviews.title: 溫馨的旅館
reviews.text: 旅館居住起來很舒適，早餐好吃，讓人有回到家的溫馨感，附近的餐廳、超市很多，旅館提供最近的火車站來回接駁，非常方便。

reviews.title: stay was much worse from the last time, due to noisy people next door

reviews.negatives: noisy people next door

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: We had bugs in our room and when we told the staff they did nothing. All 3 of us ended up with bug bites. One of us left early refusing to stay and the rest of us left as soon as we were able. We all are taking precautions and praying that we don't bring anything into our homes.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: The electricity was out my whole stay n i was sweating and very uncomfortable & they still charge me very high

reviews.title: L
reviews.positives: Room was very clean
reviews.negatives: The shower wasn't working

reviews.title: Problematic stay made good by manager.
reviews.positives: The front desk manager was great.  They ended up writing off our room charge completely due to the problems.
reviews.negatives: Sheets were stained!!!!!!  WiFi did not work at all.  TV stations for MSNBC and Fox News were both completely malfunctioning.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.positives: The property outside was nice
reviews.negatives: The beds were hard as a rock k. The shower was cracked at the bottom  the shower door was broken    There was no water in the room  this was a big disappointment The walls are paper thin. I heard the next door room like they were in my room      I won’t be back

reviews.title: Not a good value for the price
reviews.positives: The beds were comfortable and the breakfast was good. Conveniently located for sightseeing
reviews.negatives:
Unfortunately we were given a room with a bathroom that had a lot of hair and dirt on the floor. When we brought it up to the receptionist they moved us to another room which had the same issue- a lot of hair on the floor. Since housekeeping had already been gone for the day we requested the room to be cleaned the next day which unfortunately had not been done. We had to take out our own trash, dirty towels and the dirty bathroom had not been cleaned even though we specifically requested it. You would think they would make sure it gets done to make it right. 

Our neighbors were watching tv loudly at night during our stay so we weren’t able to get sleep. Walls seems thin. Also there is construction happening early in the morning. It did not bother us but could be bothersome for someone who wants to sleep in while on vacation.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
Staff pleasant
Location good for.my purposes
Parking good
reviews.negatives:
television was totally unacceptable. Many stations did not work listed as other stations on the banner on the television. All stations snowy and unable to view. They said the Porter was going to go in to see if he could manage things. Nothing got fixed.
Bed linen was a terrible not fitting over the mattress correctly. Pulled halfway over the mattress. No mattress pad in place. A flying bug of sorts was on the fitted sheet when I turned to the bed down 
Foam lumpy pillows in a $175 a night hotel! Couldn't use more than one. Otherwise your head was cricked up.
Rooms and bathroom do not appear to have been updated in quite some time. Cracked shower stall.
Asked about the AAA discount which I am a member. I was told the discount was" a dollar"

reviews.title: Short sheeted experience
reviews.positives: The hotel was very convenient to the highway and a great diner next door.
reviews.negatives: the sheets on the bed were a challenge. It is almost like they tried to fit a queen sheet and mattress pad on a king sized bed. The fitted bottom sheet and the mattress pad came off each time you moved on the bed. We notified housekeeping but nothing was done. Additionally, the only thing housekeeping did during our two-night stay was make the aforementioned bed with its misfitted sheets and replace the towels. No cleaning was done of the bathroom.

reviews.title: Not very comfortable
reviews.negatives: Bed very hard and uncomfortable. Also had a queen sheet stretched into a kind bed which came off all night.

reviews.title: My stay at this hotel was Ok but not good enough.
reviews.positives: Not good.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast was not god.

reviews.title: It was ok once we got into the second room. The bed was comfortable. The shower was good. But the wall plug to use with
reviews.positives: Convenience to work site. Convenient restaurant next door.
reviews.negatives: The first room we were assigned had a faulty heating unit. The temperature was 65. Two maintenance persons tried to adjust the heat but the AC wouldn’t turn off. They brought in another unit which wouldn’t shut off the heat so the temperature continued to shoot out 80 degree heat. We asked for another room which they did arrange, but we had to pack up everything we had already unpacked, and cart it to another floor.

reviews.title: We will absolutely look to stay at Hampton Inn's again, and we travel a lot.

reviews.title: Comfortable business-type hotel in Commack, NY
reviews.positives: Really nice business-style hotel just off the Long Island Expressway. Large, comfortable and quiet room. Staff was competent and efficient. Lots of outlets in the room, which is always nice. Lots of free parking.
reviews.negatives: The pool was a few degrees too cold in my opinion. Also, I would have preferred dark or French roast coffee at breakfast, instead of light roast.  Wish there was a hot tub.

reviews.title: Glad we had the chance to stay at the Commack Hampton Inn
reviews.positives: I liked the scrambled eggs and fresh fruit….coffee was good too.  My son liked the bagels.  The beds were really comfortable with a lot of pillows.  We used the refrigerator and the microwave.  Liked that we had coffee all day.  The location was terrific, close to shopping.
reviews.negatives: The first night was difficult as there was a wedding party staying at the hotel and they were super noisy, even banging on the doors at 6:00 in the morning.  We were hoping that our stay would not be like the first night.  Glad we The next two nights were really nice…got great sleep.

reviews.title: I will stay again. I had a great experience. Thank you.
reviews.positives: The location was perfect for my event. Staff were great.
reviews.negatives: Everything was great. I have nothing negative to say.

reviews.title: Excellent stay in spite of ongoing renovations
reviews.positives: Excellent friendly, welcoming staff; complimentary breakfast was delicious; and the atmosphere was very nice, yet also very comfortable and casual, perfect for me and my friends. I would love to return to this location again sometime in the future. Thank you!
reviews.negatives: A very minor issue, but due to the renovations being done, it was a little less convenient than I would have expected to get luggage into the hotel on arrival and back out to the car on departure. I know that this issue is temporary, so I've barely given it any weight in how I would rate my stay. I hope to return sometime after the renovations are done!
